mapper.select: SELECT id, role_name, role_code, description, created_at FROM user_roles ORDER BY id

SELECT urr.id, urr.user_id, urr.role_id, urr.created_at, u.username, ur.role_name, ur.role_code FROM user_role_relations urr JOIN users u ON urr.user_id = u.id JOIN user_roles ur ON urr.role_id = ur.id WHERE urr.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY urr.created_at
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM user_role_relations urr JOIN user_roles ur ON urr.role_id = ur.id WHERE urr.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.role_code = #{roleCode}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_role_relations WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND role_id = #{roleId}
